examples: I can't get enough of them, especially around Halloween when the shadows from the leafless trees take on ominous shapes.
I'm entering some bright, burning country - leafless, wild.
Sinewy roots stretch above the snowline and the skeletal frames of leafless birch trees tremble in the wind.
Hammou pauses by a leafless argan and snaps one of its silvery twigs.
The leafless, unbeautiful island is monochromatic.
